Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 3:

What are the benefits of moving the lu_seq_range definitions out of lustre_idl.h? After your patch, every file that includes seq_range.h also includes lustre_idl.h.

Patch Set 3:

John: This is the first of what will be a series of similar changes in order to better organize the code.  Once that's done, separating userspace, kernelspace and common headers should be a much more tractable problem.  Also note that only the things that require lu_seq_range are now including it.

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

Sorry, every structure that goes on the wire should be defined in lustre_idl.h. That's the rule and it's a good one.

Patch Set 3:

I'd argue that shoving everything that goes on the wire (along with various functions, defines, etc.) into a giant file violates the Lustre Coding Guidelines, as it is neither beautiful, nor does it do what it says on the tin.

You could argue that because it goes on the wire, I should include seq_range.h in lustre_idl.h so that if something is sending data over the wire, all any piece of code that sends things over the wire has to do is include the one file.  I'd be fine with that.

On the flip side, I'd also argue that things that should never send data on the wire, such as ldiskfs should never include lustre_idl.h as it sends nothing over the wire.  Yet, it does.  It should be including only the things it needs to do it's job.

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

(6 comments)

PPC64 Builder: build succesful

Patch Set 4:

Code-wise looks good to me.

Patch Set 4:

I believe I addressed all of Andreas' feedback, I am planning on doing more of these with each slice of lustre_idl, so that it's just the on-the-wire data structures and defines.

Would breaking up lustre_user into logical groups with data structures/functions make sense?  Eventually, all of this should allow 6401 to happen as user/kernel modules pick and choose what is needed, thus achieving the goal.

parents.subject: LU-6215 o2iblnd: handle new struct ib_cq_init_attr

commit.subject: LU-6401 headers: Create single .h for lu_seq_range
commit.message:
LU-6401 headers: Create single .h for lu_seq_range

Put lu_seq_range related functions into a single .h.
Include directly from files which use it, and remove definitions from
lustre_idl.h

Signed-off-by: Ben Evans <bevans@cray.com>
Change-Id: I2e8912688bc5b9fd77fd7b1c85d2dee27cfd825c
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/15952
Tested-by: Jenkins
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
